sections.paragraph:
verb לגבוה

be tall; be haughty; be exalted

verb להגביה

to raise, elevate, lift; to make tall

verb הוגבה

be elevated, raised, lifted; be made tall

adjective גבוה

high, tall, lofty; proud

masculine noun גובה

height, altitude, highness, tallness, stature, loftiness, level; pride, haughtiness

feminine noun

eyebrow, brow
